plan.segment_label: Mid-Market accounts with declining usage, reporting/data issues, and renewal in <90 days
plan.root_cause_hypothesis: Across all three accounts, power-user counts have dropped 30-35% over 14 days (A001: 40→25, A010: 38→27, A014: 37→33), coinciding with open tickets pointing to data reliability and adoption friction. A001 (T010) and A010 (T004) both involve the reporting/dashboard module — A001 explicitly reports missing recent data in dashboard exports, and A010's power user is questioning the very usage drop we're observing, suggesting a possible data freshness/pipeline issue affecting reporting trust. A014 (T003) has a distinct but equally severe issue: a mobile onboarding bug blocking new user activation, which explains the steep health drop (71→52) and NPS of 3. The shared pattern is that product reliability defects are eroding power-user engagement right before renewal, with NPS scores (6, 5, 3) confirming declining sentiment.

intervention_plan.action: Two-track intervention: (1) Engineering hotfix and root-cause triage for the reporting data-freshness defect (A001, A010) plus the mobile onboarding bug (A014), followed by (2) a CSM-led 'renewal recovery' call to each account that delivers the fix confirmation, walks through restored reporting/onboarding flows, and re-establishes value with the executive sponsor.

plan.success_metric: Restore weekly power-users in the segment to baseline (≥35 per account, matching 2026-04-10 levels) and close all three open tickets within the measurement window; secure verbal renewal commitment from A014 before 2026-05-20.
plan.fallback_if_intervention_fails: Escalate to VP of Customer Success and Product leadership; offer A014 a 30-day renewal extension with service credit; engage executive sponsor outreach for A001 and A010 and initiate save-play with discount authority up to 10%.
